name: 功与能量
subject: physics
curriculum_points: Describe the motion of an object traveling in a circular path. Centripetal acceleration is the component of an object’s acceleration directed toward the center of the object’s circular path. The magnitude of centripetal acceleration for an object moving in a circular path is the ratio of the object’s tangential speed squared to the radius of the circular path. Relevant equation: a_c = v^2 / r
Centripetal acceleration can result from a single force, more than one force, or components of forces exerted on an object in circular motion.
The net acceleration of an object moving in a circle is the vector sum of the centripetal acceleration and tangential acceleration.

Relevant equation: a_c = v^2 / r

The net acceleration of an object moving in a circle is the vector sum of the centripetal acceleration and tangential acceleration.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「功与能量」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Describe the motion of an object traveling in a circular path. Centripetal acceleration is the component of an object’s …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Centripetal acceleration can result from a single force, more than one force, or… 对理解「功与能量」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
